title: Redeeming a paid transaction requires matching person binding
statement: Redeeming a paid transaction_id must require Transaction.person_id == current_user.id OR both NULL (guest-checkout). The NULL-NULL branch must not be tightened without preserving the guest-checkout path; the non-NULL/non-match branch must always reject.

claims_code.where: events.py:1694-1727 — register_for_event binds Transaction.person_id at redemption time and rejects mismatch
payments.py — sets person_id=current_user_id if authenticated, NULL for guest
payments.py:474-503 — webhook lifecycle promotes guest tx to keyed when the user signs up post-purchase

source: commit 74962cb (pre-fix: any user could redeem another's tx); commit 3750138 (guest-checkout NULL-NULL path)
